[]: ebay shopping             Quote Post by maganaxy » Mon Oct 15, 2012 6:21 am Does online shopping and ebay shopping effect me when i get my taxes done ? im new to online shopping and just started to buy on ebay.. a friend told me that next year when i go do my taxes i would have too pay cause you don't pay tax.. i assume this only apply for ebay shopping cause i don't pay sale taxes but my other online purchases i have made i had to pay sale taxes... so could someone please tell me how this all works out. ___________________________ keyword research ~ keyword tool ~ keyword tracking ~ affiliate elite

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 15, 2012 9:33 am You don't have to do anything tax-wise if you are a buyer.
